name: MinIO
short_description: High-performance S3-compatible object storage for building scalable storage solutions.
description: MinIO is a high-performance, S3-compatible object storage server for private cloud, backups, and datasets. It supports distributed erasure coding, IAM, replication, versioning, encryption, and an administrative console—compatible with S3 clients and Kubernetes deployments.
usecases: Build a private cloud storage solution compatible with S3 applications.
Store backups, archives, or media files with scalable object storage.
Use as the backend for Nextcloud's external storage.
Run AI/ML workloads that need S3-compatible storage for datasets.
notes: Console runs on port 9001, API on port 9000
Default credentials are minioadmin/minioadmin - change in production
Distributed mode available for multi-node deployments
